title: Chain 1/8: Dry Cleaning Drop-off
scene: 你把西装送去干洗店。（对话链：生活服务）

turns.en: Hi, what can we clean for you today?

turns.cn: 这套西装，下周三前要取。
turns.en: This suit. I need it by next Wednesday.

turns.cn: 袖口有个污渍，我们会重点处理。
turns.en: There's a stain on the cuff. We'll treat that.
How much will it be?

turns.cn: 十二块九，加急另收五块。
turns.en: Twelve ninety. Rush is five extra.
No rush. Wednesday is fine.
Here's your ticket. Bring it when you pick up.

title: Chain 2/8: Dentist Checkup
scene: 你定期去牙医那里洗牙。（对话链：生活服务）

turns.en: Any bleeding when you brush lately?

turns.cn: 偶尔有一点，右边磨牙敏感。
turns.en: A little sometimes. My upper right molar is sensitive.

turns.cn: 我看看……牙龈有点发炎，今天先洗牙。
turns.en: Let me take a look. Your gums are a bit inflamed. We'll clean them today.
Will I need a shot?

turns.cn: 洗牙不用，如果补牙再说。
turns.en: Not for cleaning. We'll see if you need one for a filling.
Okay. Please go easy on me.

title: Chain 3/8: Schedule Filling
scene: 牙医建议你补牙，前台帮你约时间。（对话链：生活服务）

turns.cn: 医生建议补右上磨牙，要约吗？
turns.en: The doctor recommends a filling on your upper right molar. Book it?
Yes. Any openings next week?

turns.cn: 周二下午三点或周四上午十点。
turns.en: Tuesday at three PM or Thursday at ten AM.
Tuesday at three. Is it covered by insurance?

turns.cn: 大部分覆盖，自付大概五十。
turns.en: Mostly covered. Copay is about fifty.
Okay. Please book it.

title: Chain 4/8: DMV Renewal
scene: 你去车管所换驾照。（对话链：生活服务）

turns.en: Hi, what brings you in today?
My license is expiring. I'd like to renew it.
Please fill out this form and take the vision test.
Do I need to take the road test again?
No, just pass the vision screening.
How long until the new license arrives?

turns.cn: 两周左右，这期间用纸质的临时证。
turns.en: About two weeks. Use this paper temp license until then.

title: Chain 5/8: Shoe Repair
scene: 你去修鞋店换鞋底。（对话链：生活服务）

turns.cn: 这双皮鞋鞋底磨平了，能换吗？
turns.en: The soles on these dress shoes are worn. Can you replace them?

turns.cn: 可以，橡胶底四十五，皮底六十。
turns.en: Yes. Rubber soles are forty-five, leather sixty.
Rubber is fine. How many days?
Three days. Pick up Thursday.
Okay. Thank you.

title: Chain 6/8: Pick Up Dry Cleaning
scene: 周三你去取干洗的西装。（对话链：生活服务）

turns.en: Pickup? May I see your ticket?

turns.cn: 在这，袖口污渍去掉了吗？
turns.en: Here. Did the cuff stain come out?
We got it out. Please check the fit.
Looks great. Card, please.
Twelve ninety. Thank you.

title: Chain 7/8: Key Copy
scene: 你顺路在五金店配一把备用钥匙。（对话链：生活服务）

turns.en: Can you copy a house key?
Sure. Standard keys are three dollars.
Two copies, please.
Five minutes. One moment.
Let me know when they're ready.

title: Chain 8/8: Errands Done
scene: 你办完一堆事回家，跟室友汇报。（对话链：生活服务）

turns.en: You were out forever. Get everything done?

turns.cn: 干洗取了，牙约了，驾照续了，鞋送去修。
turns.en: Got the dry cleaning, booked the dentist, renewed my license, shoes at the cobbler.
Productive day. I'll make dinner.
Thanks. I'll rest a bit.
Remember shoes on Thursday.
It's on my phone.
